textByHash.0313c154c85035177e24971aa97d281472ee17c8: What did you need of the Company?
textByHash.0345411b0b164ebd4d850786e2841bf1b6cfdc2e: I will await your return soon, then.
textByHash.040a7946fdeec4f9afba1fe2d76a82a674887be5: I am happy to see that the trust we put in you has not been in vain.
textByHash.0cab933ce5480f6726d27c9f293b3767f178fffa: We need pieces of coal in the next minutes.
textByHash.13e79d985ef6d744119e51f3e747c1cf72fde987: Excellent, I thought you'd like this!
textByHash.1578b925c353ee8233db9a5c12416dad013b1e94: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of gold ore?
textByHash.198f73e4597416aa798baa4af7ed326ecb813112: Ah, always looking for ways to help us!
textByHash.19f61bbb250e0e85c0b878990a0b467dde2f0171: Yes, I think we do have something for you.
textByHash.1cc8bb3512cbb396bac0138a783726ff0ffcda41: We need pieces of clay in the next minutes.
textByHash.33c787fe3da031474ec2534e355e5b37ae4c54c7: I see. This sounds like a most serious matter, but I cannot bend the rules.
textByHash.34733de2cdbda6ac2d0b4955d5a4416d7a1ece2a: Wonderful! I will personally oversee that it goes to the trade floor on time!
textByHash.371dbd28db883e4e36cdd8372a971ba7214c219e: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of copper ore?
textByHash.38074737e0c5804468d997f8239ef1380bf9f55a: The Company is pleased to offer more work to an eager worker such as yourself!
textByHash.38bbc6c72c8acfa15e6f4c1ef51af875d2871288: Thanks, I will make sure the director hears of your expeditiousness!
textByHash.3c9b30317be22d328a9b7f5df1d9a46d9ebdb5ef: We need pieces of tin ore in the next minutes.
textByHash.3f701968b33741ac7526aab8395a1ca311b74415: Please, in that case, you're wasting my time.
textByHash.41d997fd89073d8783eb8fe6eb482644fb189d01: Of course, we reserve our best tasks just for you!
textByHash.44223a6a5b20cafe22fc12f699c7aee550f0e5d4: I'm afraid I have no more work to offer you, , please speak to the director.
textByHash.4c67af0f7fbf48abbfd95ea553ff67dd029e61df: The clock is ticking, please hurry back.
textByHash.560a6095e085e029392ee69e4becb651044556bc: You have done a great service to the Company!
textByHash.58461dbba1ec48ed54b0e0d968a36f3b893c7481: Please, it would be appreciated if you made up your mind before you ask. I'm very busy you know.
textByHash.5daa5c7193738fd3195ecb0ebf4d86626bd5eb51: Keep up what you're doing! The more you help us out, the more we appreciate you!
textByHash.6049290faca053d928ee921a7d4e624721b4eb2a: And what can I do for you on this fine day?
textByHash.630c3f1285d1f0a3bbdfc911176306baa1b60622: Let's see... yes, yes, I do have a task for you.
textByHash.63841bcbd1b7881641911c1b0aa1e6074f4c53da: Is everything okay? I didn't think you normally refused our tasks.
textByHash.65839fceafb52c1c564b173b3ded3c3011412847: I have to admit, I was worried for a moment, but I'm glad to see you came through for us.
textByHash.659bead51e77889c9eec5f8b97a7415a0913d52a: Nor does the Black Guard. They are under the command of the Consortium, not the other way around.
textByHash.6aee28c7eb7cb30ec79be5cb0715bbff35957776: We need pieces of copper ore in the next minutes.
textByHash.6af3bc3d50130056f883ec050756eb37d3fd7acd: Blasidar does not command the Company.
textByHash.73e7397bf9082a6da565f65ba5744715c24159e7: I believe we have some work available, yes.
textByHash.7665280b430e56fa2524c44421fbad399634e398: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of iron ore?
textByHash.7d1db62e3f8e0bb23c31071f5d2090259b1e739c: And what can I do for you?
textByHash.7d9e52d2b0563f22ed8432e27e43866e7d1c9d35: How may the Company assist you today?
textByHash.7e07efc31b162a19e8eb786b3869040e31b792b2: Why, naturally ! The director is standing right over there!
textByHash.7e74c8c03d92232dc7320b44f4592bb46580013b: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of silver ore?
textByHash.7e773d889e913e95a4f3aae93a24a9ca910011c6: I suppose you have other important business to attend to?
textByHash.7e8cf9717955571c67709165e983fc0997692b13: It's all very simple. You perform some tasks for us, help us out a little when we need something done urgently, and in reward you will rise in our estimation.
textByHash.810267c55cc40b7e6ea3c191f144bdaea9ef5af2: And not a minute too late as well. Well done.
textByHash.8a8cc4f6bb8eba835aa67c9890674e238e6cc8fb: Welcome back to the palace of Keldagrim!
textByHash.908beae1c27e045e2a1c08c7fdcd6a5bfda74d4a: The Company isn't too pleased to hear that.
textByHash.917fd0ad787ee440ea1b829287680caa52854ebb: Fair enough, maybe some other time?
textByHash.92c199691236dc5cb3fe6a98c82f03e48dbb07b9: Then please, hurry up before time runs out.
textByHash.9346e9f5d0925692a731b14ffd34af78d53a89cd: The Company appreciates the hard work you do.
textByHash.9407fe71277333211459dec8f57ff46d230b2e24: I'm sure the director will be happy to talk to you once the time is right.
textByHash.9490d93e1f2199c6235165fc6b284f7c4e9b87ad: Oh yes, as you know the Company always has work!
textByHash.9970faa6634ba0f069882209d679494dec3c84ff: I don't see any reason to grant such a privilege to a lowly worker. No, first you must prove yourself.
textByHash.9a6111779361dd88c07619a83610ecd11a993de7: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of mithril ore?
textByHash.9e74e906e198c7f493e37b1a3332c897288baad8: I dare say we have something for you, yes.
textByHash.a0422c01b50b9520aa64bda1c7b61a2d352b2dc2: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of coal?
textByHash.a058c86b70b5ad77eb2ada03c4252fdbee533316: There's always work to be done, yes.
textByHash.a144cc2f4bf59221bd4a195df6a32925ed9c6d50: Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.ab8d72714dacd285470122218eb96053783e6246: I knew you were the right human for the job!
textByHash.b54eaf0b308b2af45f0e00c18e08a59defb1784a: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of clay?
textByHash.b5edfa94976f96541709f3dff25620f5af6e0a82: I do believe we do, yes!
textByHash.b9b98b06fedf9a9c30924e7bf68c29894c27b410: Come to help us out some more?
textByHash.be5cd9ab2c0d895fed0a263700a2c31a52a337ec: I can't say I'm too pleased to hear that, to be honest.
textByHash.c02c4fff5e884a2202b53ad41542f34f7e6d940f: Yes, the Company always has work to do!
textByHash.c1a9d49631446a96d9f389c2b6c5f06305c111f8: Come in, come in! And tell us what you need!
textByHash.c311bdb3fe9663b56ede380e9bd6ade87e86dd7a: You need to prove yourself to the company first before such a privilege is bestowed on you.
textByHash.c412e12d8e07d7835d5993731826e5db9e56377c: The Company appreciates what you have done so far, , but the director will only speak to the most loyal of followers.
textByHash.c451e33c7b0fc8ad4f16c465b24ac1ec1264fed8: Oh, hello there ! Nice to see you!
textByHash.c700c0ee07c6321b676eae618141bf4990813361: You should speak directly to the director.
textByHash.cb4939e37faa1a1cba18ccd261848bfb13003ad3: Oh. Didn't know you were the type to refuse work.
textByHash.cce66ea4cae317592c68fa955bed94cb5699234b: We need pieces of mithril ore in the next minutes.
textByHash.cf2581e47aa3c5a09a1856bef9ff0bfee3d72e90: We need pieces of iron ore in the next minutes.
textByHash.d3813485d3f28b0ab2925916bd3ae1dfd3c49b4a: We need pieces of gold ore in the next minutes.
textByHash.dae822f4828f742687c1ddada698a1ce764fdc0c: Thanks! But hurry back please, we really need that ore!
textByHash.de1667203470942d25fbb68e02df5dbf02e1f672: Have you completed your task yet? Did you get our pieces of tin ore?
textByHash.de2612231ffd81f803564d75db59a40e23c9087e: That does not reflect well on you.
textByHash.de96f50af95a10fb0035bad500a6ebb70cdb726d: The Company has noted your willingness to help.
textByHash.e63f33be4feb90eadc1fbc89d6e565fab325b465: That is not a request that I can grant you yet, , even though I am impressed with you so far.
textByHash.ee71ff4fdf2e0e50ae420b53bc5e61e3a79d18a2: We need pieces of silver ore in the next minutes.
textByHash.f81408ee00fdfa74cf53a4b5d5724e2b4b7f7848: Is there anything you need assistance with?
textByHash.f8dc2382a8cd9440b32b9bfa009880fe6ae4d9ce: What can I do for you, human?
textByHash.fc994e75f421df9cb8237826a7c69ffd4722700f: And I would grant you such a request, why?
textByHash.ff8a4f09d354c140af30aafd7e1a0367f68189fb: That ore needs to go on the trade floor soon, , please hurry back with it.
